programme.title: The Accountant
programme.desc: Christian Wolff (Ben Affleck) is a mathematics savant with more affinity for numbers than people. Using a small-town CPA office as a cover, he makes his living as a freelance accountant for dangerous criminal organizations. With a Treasury agent (J.K. Simmons) hot on his heels, Christian takes on a state-of-the-art robotics company as a legitimate client. As Wolff gets closer to the truth about a discrepancy that involves millions of dollars, the body count starts to rise.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Plane
programme.desc: Pilot Brodie Torrance saves passengers from a lightning strike by making a risky landing on a war-torn island -- only to find that surviving the landing was just the beginning. When dangerous rebels take most of the passengers hostage, the only person Torrance can count on for help is Louis Gaspare, an accused murderer who was being transported by the FBI.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Accountant
programme.desc: Christian Wolff (Ben Affleck) is a mathematics savant with more affinity for numbers than people. Using a small-town CPA office as a cover, he makes his living as a freelance accountant for dangerous criminal organizations. With a Treasury agent (J.K. Simmons) hot on his heels, Christian takes on a state-of-the-art robotics company as a legitimate client. As Wolff gets closer to the truth about a discrepancy that involves millions of dollars, the body count starts to rise.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a missing teenager's body turns up in a trash bin, the team discovers the secret that got him killed.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A homeless family living in a station wagon becomes the team's focus as it investigates the murder of a woman whose body was found at the bottom of a river.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The detectives must solve the 20-year-old case of a 6-year-old boy's rape and murder.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team takes on the high-stakes world of high-school cheerleading when an anonymous confession to a teen girl's murder turns up at an art exhibit.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: The sisters battle a warlock who exterminates witches and takes their powers; an interfering "Whitelighter" causes friction between Piper and Leo.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: When Prue discovers that her ex-boyfriend is mutating into a demon, she and her sisters battle for his soul in an underworld wrestling ring.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: A warlock tricks Prue into marrying him in an effort to steal the Book of Shadows; Phoebe and Piper turn to the dark side and delight in their evil powers.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Charmed
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Bad and the Cursed
programme.desc: When Phoebe becomes caught up in a ghost town's violent past, Prue must travel back in time to rescue her sister from an appalling fate.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Piper's wedding day is jeopardized when Prue is arrested on suspicion of murder after her astral self engages in late-night shenanigans.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Lilly breaks procedural rules, putting herself and others in danger while investigating a drug counselor who was killed two days before he would testify against a student.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The case of two teens who killed themselves after a murderous rampage at a mall in 1995 reopens when evidence indicates there may have been a third shooter.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A 2004 case involving the disappearance of a female war veteran reopens when her prosthetic arm is found in a river.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Bones found in a subway tunnel are identified as those of a sandhog miner who disappeared in 1947.

programme.title: Tom Clancy's Without Remorse
programme.desc: Seeking justice for the murder of his pregnant wife, an elite Navy SEAL uncovers a covert plot that threatens to engulf the United States and Russia in an all-out war.

programme.title: Live: NHL on TNT Face Off
programme.desc: Wayne Gretzky, Liam McHugh, Anson Carter, and Paul Bissonnette present pregame coverage.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Canadiens play the Sabres in the East second round Game 1 at KeyBank Center. Buffalo reached the second round for the first time since 2007 by beating Boston 4-2, while Montreal advanced by defeating Tampa Bay in a seven-game series.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: Western Conference Second Round, Game 2.

programme.title: Live: NHL Post-Game on TNT
programme.desc: Liam McHugh, Anson Carter and Paul Bissonnette recap the night in the NHL.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back at Colonial Diner, offering some new bizarre specials to unsuspecting patrons; they take a ride through the park; after a nasty fall, the Joker must get park goers to help them out from underneath their bike.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team investigates the 1919 death of a young girl who wanted more rights for women.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team reopens the 2005 murder of a longshoreman who got in the middle of a profitable human-trafficking ring led by the Russian mob.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a nurse confesses to six mercy killings, the team reopens a 1998 case involving a terminally ill man who died suspiciously.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: While investigating the 2006 murder-suicide of a family, the team must contend with an obsessed, suicidal killer in a hostage situation.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When an attorney is found dead near the body of a private escort, the team must piece together what connected the two seemingly random victims; Jubal's connection with one of the victims makes finding the killer much more personal.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a truck filled with armor-piercing rifles is hijacked, the team works to discover who stole it, and what they have planned for the stolen weapons; a friend from OA's past returns to help with the case, but OA isn't sure he can trust him.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the police ignore a desperate father's plea for help, he abducts a billionaire's daughter and holds her hostage in a safe room until his own missing child is returned to him; Jubal puts his hostage negotiation skills to the test.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the team is called to the scene of a murder, it quickly suspects political motivation; Maggie contemplates a decision that could affect her entire career.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Jess LaCroix and his team come to help OA find a fugitive LaCroix arrested years ago after a bus with 26 students goes missing, and he's the main suspect.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team investigates a drug deal gone bad after the body of a college student is found; Detective Hailey Upton temporarily joins the team and finds her investigative methods clash with the Bureau's more buttoned-up environment.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team welcomes a new member, Special Agent Tiffany Wallace, as they search for killers who orchestrated a mass shooting at a media company; OA's personal connection with the case threatens to cloud his judgment.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After eight people are fatally poisoned at a deli in New York City, agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan trace the crime to an unlikely culprit and conduct a sting operation to prevent further attacks.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.
